Let me compare the before and after frames to see what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
# Compare segmentation before and after

before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after_seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("Before SPACE:")
for node in before_seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Feet: color={node['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, hash={node['hash']}")

print("\nAfter SPACE:")
for node in after_seg['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Feet: color={node['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, hash={node['hash']}")

# Check all nodes for color changes
print("\nAll nodes after SPACE:")
for node in after_seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
    print(f"Node: color={node['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={node['pixels']}, hash={node['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
